text:
Daniel Hagan writes:
> Does this adequately explain it?

Looks great, thanks. .. but why "\e000" and not "\000" ?

> + .Pp
> + The escape sequence \e000 is the string terminator.  When present in the
> + .Ar format  ,
> + the 
> + .Ar format
> + will be truncated at the \e000 character.

-Archie
